text:
- Update to 4.1.9
- Replace LICENSE_FILE with LICENSE
- Pet portlint on LICENSE order
- Clarify >= on pytz RUN_DEPENDS as per upstream
- Remove ugly PYEASYINSTALL_INSTALLARGS override
- Patch setup.py to include zip_safe=False instead
- Update and sort pkg-plist accordingly
